AND DBA MURRAY AND ASSOCIATES

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT LAWRENCE MURRAY'S PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1281.6. EACH PARTY SHALL SUBMIT TO THE COURT AND TO EACH OTHER, NO LATER THAN JUNE 25, 2009, A LIST OF FIVE (5) PROPOSED ARBITRATORS ALONG WITH A STATEMENT OF EACH ARBITRATOR'S QUALIFICATIONS AND BILLING RATES AND AN INDICATION WHETHER THE ARBITRATOR HAS AGREED TO SERVE IF CHOSEN BY THE COURT. THE COURT WILL NOMINATE FIVE (5) ARBITRATORS FROM THOSE LISTS. IF THE PARTIES HAVE NOT NOTIFIED THE COURT WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S NOMINEES THAT THEY HAVE AGREED ON AN ARBITRATOR, THE COURT WILL APPOINT ONE OF ITS NOMINEES. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Hearing; Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration;
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT LAWRENCE MURRAY'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR PURSUANT TO C C P SECTION 1281.6. EACH PARTY SHALL SUBMIT TO THE COURT AND TO EACH OTHER, NO LATER THAN JUNE 25, 2009, A LIST OF FIVE (5) PROPOSED ARBITRATORS ALONG WITH A STATEMENT OF EACH ARBITRATOR'S QUALIFICATIONS AND BILLING RATES AND AN INDICATION WHETHER THE ARBITRATOR HAS AGREED TO SERVE IF CHOSEN BY THE COURT. THE COURT WILL NOMINATE FIVE (5) ARBITRATORS FROM THOSE LISTS. IF THE PARTIES HAVE NOT NOTIFIED THE COURT WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S NOMINEES THAT THEY HAVE AGREED ON AN ARBITRATOR, THE COURT WILL APPOINT ONE OF ITS NOMINEES. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
